objective: Apply 6 targeted drift/conflict corrections to STANDARDS.md: Stampede doc schema exceptions, branch naming feat/ alias and origin/develop to origin/main, stale review contract row, Baseline Security heading missing Stampede, hook gate scope qualifier, and structured plan scope note.
scope_boundary: 6 targeted fixes to resolve drift and conflicts identified in issue #676.
No consumer-repo mutations in this branch.
No new policy introductions - corrections and clarifications only.
out_of_scope: New policy additions beyond the 6 enumerated fixes.
Restructuring of STANDARDS.md sections not related to the 6 fixes.
Changes to CI workflows or hook scripts.
research_summary: Issue #676 was filed to address 6 concrete drift/conflict items in STANDARDS.md: (1) missing Stampede schema exception doc, (2) branch naming has stale origin/develop ref and missing feat/ alias, (3) a stale review contract table row referencing a superseded model, (4) Baseline Security heading omits Stampede from scope, (5) hook gate rule lacks scope qualifier for consumer repos, (6) structured plan requirement lacks scope note. All 6 are surgical corrections to existing text.

sprints.name: Sprint 1 - Apply 6 STANDARDS.md corrections
sprints.goal: Write all 6 targeted fixes to STANDARDS.md in a single focused pass.
tasks: Fix 1: Add Stampede schema exception note to schema-guard section.
Fix 2: Correct branch naming section: add feat/ alias, change origin/develop to origin/main.
Fix 3: Remove or update stale review contract table row.
Fix 4: Add Stampede to Baseline Security heading scope.
Fix 5: Add scope qualifier to hook gate rule.
Fix 6: Add scope note to structured plan requirement.
acceptance_criteria: No other STANDARDS.md content is altered.
JSON lint and governance surface validator pass.

specialist_reviews.focus: Correctness and completeness of the 6 STANDARDS.md corrections
specialist_reviews.summary: All 6 fixes are surgical and non-conflicting. Corrections address real drift without introducing new policy.

alternate_model_review.summary: Alternate-family review accepted. All 6 STANDARDS.md corrections are bounded, non-architectural, and correct. No policy additions present.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: 6 targeted corrections to STANDARDS.md as enumerated in issue #676.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Apply all 6 STANDARDS.md text corrections then commit.
handoff_acceptance_criteria: No other files changed beyond the allowed_write_paths in the execution scope.
Governance validator passes on the final commit.

material_deviation_rules: Any change outside the 6 enumerated fixes requires a new issue and plan.
